title: Mamas & Papas 3 Pack Large Cotton Muslin Squares, Turtle
features: Supsersoft cotton is breathable, durable and washes well
Co-ordinates with rest of the collection
AGE SUITABILITY & DIMENSIONS: 0m+. Dimensions W90cm x L 90cm
CARE & MAINTENANCE: Machine washable at 40°C and tumble dryable at a low heat
description: Handy 3-pack of muslin squares, ideal for mopping up spills on your little one or yourself! In a large 90x90cm size these ultra-useful muslins are crafted from super soft cotton and co-ordinate effortlessly with the rest of the collection. With different prints - 2 x turtle print and 1 x soft stripe print - in playful sea-inspired aqua, green and blue shades.

specifications_table.Care instructions: ‎Machine washable at 40°C and tumble dryable at a low heat
specifications_table.Warranty description: ‎2 year manufacturer from date of purchase
